dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yeah, no.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: What?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya cannot accept this mama.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're just not going to cut it for the mother role, Franky.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: You're literally a spy. Couldn't you have done my disguise better?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There's only so much I can do with your height and physique.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I can't believe I volunteered for this!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Have a peanut.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Operation Strix.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: In order to stop a key figure in Ostania, Desmond, from trying to start a w*r,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I was given this top-secret mission as a member of WISE.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We were able to pass the written exam to get into the prestigious Eden College,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but who knew the interview process's next stage demanded the attendance of both parents?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Very well.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: SECURE A WIFE

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I guess I'll have to explore my options.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Did you hear? A thief might've entered our office.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Capital City Berlint, City Hall

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Apparently, they only searched drawers with information regarding the girls.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Like, what? What kind of creep does that?

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Honestly, the section chief is way creepier.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: He's always ogling me.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: That's because you're always wearing those short skirts.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Well, my boyfriend likes it when I wear them.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: You've got a nice figure yourself, Sharon, so flaunt it more.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: You don't bother anymore once you have a kid.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: So hey...

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: What do you think about this, Yor? Isn't it creepy?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Sorry?

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Is that the section chief's coffee? Let's put some boogers in it.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Do boogers somehow make it taste better?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You know, Yor... I've gotta say you're rather...

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: unique.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: I know, right?

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: She's so out there that I bet guys keep their distance.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: Come on, now, Millie.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You've got a nice face and body, Yor.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You'd be a knockout if you just dressed up.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Uh-huh...

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: I'll give you the deets on some of my favorite cosmetics.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm honestly content as long as I get to keep this job.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: But aren't you, like, ? You need to be careful.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: There seem to be a lot of spies around lately, you know?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: So people are apparently getting reported over the tiniest things.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: The other day, a single woman in her late twenties

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: got reported by her neighbors for being suspicious.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Wait, what? That's hilarious.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: You know everything, Camilla.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: True, it's unheard of to be single at that age. Very suspicious.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, I see. Thank you for the warning.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Oh, yeah. I'm having a party at my place this weekend.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You should totally come, Yor.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Make sure you bring your partner with you.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: Isn't that asking a bit much?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Maybe the creeper who snuck into this place will go with her.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: That's so mean!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Hello, Briar residence.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Hey, Sis. How have you been?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, Yuri.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: How's work going?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Don't worry. I'm still employed.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm worried about you. You're kinda unusual, y'know.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: How rude. I'm completely normal.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Isn't it about time you got married?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Anyone you're interested in?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: This again?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: The thing is, there's a chance I might get promoted...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Meaning I'll probably be even busier running around than before.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: But I can't leave you alone like this,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: so I'm not sure if I should take it.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: The whole reason I got this far is because of you, and I'm truly grateful.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: That's why I just want you to be happy.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I know.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank you, Yuri.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: If you want, I can introduce you to someone.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? N-No, that's okay.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: O-Oh, yes. I'm actually going to a party this weekend.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: With my partner, of course.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Huh? You have a boyfriend?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I do, actually...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So don't worry.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I see! That's great. It'll be a party with coworkers, right?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yup. Camilla's throwing it.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Ah.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Then I'll have to ask Dominic about the guy later.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I mean, I know how gullible you are.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'll have to chase him away if he's a loser.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? Um...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'll hold off on this promotion until I know he's a good guy.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, you don't need to do tha—

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I look forward to meeting him. Goodnight.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What should I do?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I need to find someone by the time of the party.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If he finds out I'm lying, he'll think I'm a weirdo and a pathological liar,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: and he'll lose even more trust in me.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I need to find someone for the sake of my little brother's promotion.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yuri, you've got the wrong idea! I was just joking earlier—

dialogue.name: Shopkeeper
dialogue.speech: Oh, dear. Did you buddy-buddy siblings actually have a quarrel?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, Shopkeeper?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry, I didn't realize it was you.

dialogue.name: Shopkeeper
dialogue.speech: Good evening. I have a client for you, Thorn Princess.

dialogue.name: Shopkeeper
dialogue.speech: The Royal Hotel.

dialogue.name: Shopkeeper
dialogue.speech: Room .

dialogue.name: Men in Black B
dialogue.speech: Apologies, my lady. This whole floor has been reserved.

dialogue.name: Men in Black A
dialogue.speech: Did anyone call for this chick?

dialogue.name: Men in Black C
dialogue.speech: Who knows?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: But I've heard...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: that a traitorous scumbag is staying here.

dialogue.name: Brennan
dialogue.speech: What in the world?!

dialogue.name: Men in Black C
dialogue.speech: It's an ambush! A lone woman—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Excuse me.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Vice Minister Brennan from the auditing department, I presume?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I am terribly sorry if I interrupted anything...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: But may I have the honor of taking your life?

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: Code name: Thorn Princess.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: An assassin.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: She was taught the skills of her trade from a young age,

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: and has done any dirty work her employer requested ever since.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's not coming off.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? Oh, no! What shall I do?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: This is the only nice dress I own.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Now I can't go to the party.

dialogue.name: flashback Yuri
dialogue.speech: Anyone you're interested in?

dialogue.name: flashback Sharon
dialogue.speech: It's unheard of to be single at that age.

dialogue.name: flashback Camilla
dialogue.speech: Make sure you bring your partner with you.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: But it's hopeless.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: When it comes to homemaking... Cleaning is the only thing I can do.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Scruffy Head!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I copied all the files of unmarried women from city hall.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Great, thanks.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: You need one who won't care you're divorced with a kid,

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: is refined enough for a prestigious school,

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: and is willing to get married within hours?

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: If a goddess like that exists, I'd sure love to meet her.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Meanwhile, I'm not picky at all, yet I can't even get a date.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How unfortunate.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Don't pity me, as*h*le!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Is having a kid bad? Am I in the way?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're not in the way at all.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Don't worry. Just go watch some TV.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: 'Kay.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Actually, why don't you just use a female agent from your work?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A lot of them got caught in the recent spy hunts, so I couldn't find a good match.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: Wake up! Hey!

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: You... You won't get away with this!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Selling people out is really in right now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We don't have enough agents, so I got another mission on top of this.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Eliminating a certain smuggling ring.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: They're working you to the bone!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Let's just get this over with.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: The quickest options would be women in bad circumstances who'd cooperate with you.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Finding dirt on them might help, too.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: If they don't have any, we can always make some up.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'd like to avoid anything risky.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Oh, please. She's plenty risky.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: She definitely doesn't look like any princess from a rich family.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Push! Push!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You've got a point.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to at least do something about her appearance.

dialogue.name: Proprietress
dialogue.speech: Now, young lady, I'm going to take your measurements. Come with me.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm being sold off somewhere!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You won't be if you behave.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Honestly, where does she learn to talk like that?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The seamstress... is married.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The proprietress was listed among the single women,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but she's been arrested once over political activities, so she's too dangerous.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Finding the right person might take longer than—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Pardon me.

dialogue.name: Female Employee
dialogue.speech: Oh, I haven't seen you in a while, Yor.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Hello. I was hoping I could get my dress fixed up.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Could I get it done as quickly as possible?

dialogue.name: Female employee
dialogue.speech: But of course. You're one of our regulars.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She managed to slip behind me so easily. Who is she?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor... Yor...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There we go.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor Briar, years old.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She has no record of being married or divorced.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Both of her parents are deceased,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and she has one brother who's much younger than her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They're both civil servants whose records are pretty clean.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Did I just let my guard down?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm far too relaxed lately.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Excuse me.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You've been staring at me ever since I walked in. May I help you?

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: Impossible! She could even sense my gaze?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er, no, um, I'm sorry...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I was just admiring how pretty you are.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Does that mean...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You have a favorable impression of my physical appearance?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er, well... Yes.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You've got a nice face and body, Yor.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You'd be a knockout if you just dressed up.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um—

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I now know how long I am!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Who's that?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Another customer.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: He has a child.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I almost pursued someone's husband.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I've heard that women have been k*lled by wives for such things.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I mean, if it happened to me,I'd just k*ll them back...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: No, I mustn't.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If I think like this, someone will eventually figure out that I'm an assassin.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I must learn to be more normal.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A-An assassin?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A spy... An assassin...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: so excited!

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The little girl was starving for entertainment.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hmm... I was considering her as a candidate to play my wife, but never mind.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I was considering him to act as my boyfriend at the party,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: but I must avoid these so-called messy lovers' quarrels.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ah, I am oh so lonely because I do not have a mama.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What brought this on?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I long for a mama.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Are you not with your wife?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, er...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I actually lost my wife two years ago,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so I'm raising her on my own now.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So I won't be k*lled for asking him to the party!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Excuse me...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Pretend to be your boyfriend?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes... I fibbed to my younger brother about having a boyfriend.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If it's not too much trouble, I was hoping you'd accompany me to this party.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, I promise I don't have any ulterior motives!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Of course, I'll thank you properly, too.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I just want to put my brother's mind at ease.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Very well.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I accept.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Really?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But I would like something in return.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So you see...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'd like you to play the role of her mother during the interview.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Her mother?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: With the future being so uncertain right now,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: my only wish is for my daughter to get into a good school.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This was also the wish of my late wife.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa is a liar.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What a wonderful person.

dialogue.name: Loid Internal
dialogue.speech: I'll have her accept something simple first,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It will only be one time. Would you be up for it?

dialogue.name: Loid internal
dialogue.speech: but I'll get her to agree to a formal marriage in the end.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: A-All right... If you think I'm fit for the role.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you. Then let us reconvene at Saturday's party.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I got a sitter for you on Saturday, so make sure you behave.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Stock up on them peanuts!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yeah, yeah.

dialogue.name: Cashier
dialogue.speech: Ten pents is your change, ribbit.

dialogue.name: Cashier
dialogue.speech: Thanks, ribbit.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ribbit?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A T... no, an F cipher.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Must be the details on the extra mission.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Retrieving art pieces that were stolen from the West and eliminating this smuggling ring.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm to carry out this mission Saturday at hours when the target meets with the buyer.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Saturday?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And so...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're going to take care of this quickly so I can make it to the party.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're helping.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Hang on a second! I'm just an informant! My fighting skills are literal trash!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Not to mention, you already pretty much capped your tab—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're talking art pieces valued at a total of three million dalcs.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm almost certain no one would notice if one or two happened to go missing.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Leave it to me.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I just so happen to have invented some new spy gear just for days like this.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He's so useful.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid is awfully late.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I hope he wasn't in some terrible accident.

dialogue.name: Lackey A
dialogue.speech: Hold it!

dialogue.name: Lackey B
dialogue.speech: Who're you workin' for?!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: You didn't tell me there'd be an army of them!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Two, four, six... of them.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I can't afford to waste even ten seconds on each one!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Reinforcements! There's no end to them.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I got 'em all in! Get in!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Whoo!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Let's see... Which one's going to accidentally go missing?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm helping myself to this one.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Hey, that's a diamond! No fair taking the expensive-looking one!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll use it as part of this whole charade.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Shut up! Give that back!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I see.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So this is what it means to have your heart toyed with.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I must keep my work relationships favorable for my brother's sake, too.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Which means that I must attend this party.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You're late, Yor!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I do apologize. Here's a gift.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Oh? I thought you were coming with your boyfriend.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Unfortunately, he had something suddenly come up.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Oh, what a shame. I was so eager to meet him!

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: What a lame excuse.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: How pathetic.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: I knew she was lying about having a guy.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Should we report the liar?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: We should!

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: I'm positive she's a spy who's been sent in to lower our country's birth rate.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: Seriously? That's so petty.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: She's just unpopular with the guys.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: Just leave her be.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You're meaner than both of us, Sharon.

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: It's too bad your boyfriend couldn't make it. I was excited to meet him.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: You're so hilarious.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: D-Dominic...

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Yuri's always so worried about you.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, could you possibly...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: just tell my brother than I came to the party with a kind gentleman?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Yeah, not happening.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Just how desperate are you to impress people, Yor?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: It just makes you look even more pathetic.

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Jeez, knock it off, Camilla!

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Stop talking to my man.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: I'll be sure to let your brother know that you came alone.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What could she possibly gain by doing that?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: This is honestly becoming tiresome.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If all of the adults here just happened to perish,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: my brother would never find out...

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: I'm so sorry. Have fun!

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Come on, Camilla. Help me bake this gratin.

dialogue.name: Female Guest A
dialogue.speech: And then that guy...

dialogue.name: Girl
dialogue.speech: Mommy!

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: My oldest here will be taking an entrance exam soon.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: At the prestigious Eden College.

dialogue.name: Female Guest B
dialogue.speech: Wow, that's wonderful!

dialogue.name: Male Guest A
dialogue.speech: He'll be a shoe-in with the elite.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: That must be what "normal" looks like.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm sure that's how my brother wanted me to end up.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Seriously? She's still here.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: She's tougher than she looks.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: I'm honestly surprised she had the nerve to show up alone.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I see... I'm too out of my league here.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I do beg your pardon.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I will have to take my leav—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm terribly sorry for arriving late.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm Yor's husband, Loid Forger.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I just needed a boyfriend, not a husband.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: sh*t!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I mixed up my mission with hers.

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Um... Mr. Forger, was it? You're bleeding.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, pardon me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: One of my patients had a violent episode.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It happens all the time to a psychiatrist.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Have you been enjoying yourself, Yor?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You're joking, right?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: You're married, Yor?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Why didn't you tell us?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, I...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's embarrassing to say so, but this is my second marriage and I already have a child,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so it may have been hard to bring up.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Don't give me that sh*t!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's my fault.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: There's absolutely no way Yor has a husband who's that handsome and hot!

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: I'll embarrass her in front of everyone!

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Yor, I just got this piping hot gratin right out of the oven!

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Oops, I seemed to have tripped!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I admire your dedication to not wasting food,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but it's a bit improper to use your feet, Yor.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, I'm so sorry.

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: That got you?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is quite delicious.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Indeed.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Did you know, Mr. Ranger...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's Forger.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: ...that she was apparently doing some questionable work before working at city hall?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: What did you do again?

dialogue.name: Dominic
dialogue.speech: Come on, stop it!

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Men would call you to their hotel rooms so you could give them "massages"?

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Oh, you little whore.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: That was...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: "Massages" were a cover for occupational murders.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, please don't get the wrong idea, Loid. I—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How wonderful.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor lost her parents at a very young age.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She did all she could to care for her younger brother,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: even if it meant sacrificing herself.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Be it for someone else

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: or for a specific reason,having to endure a merciless job

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: requires an incredible amount of dedication.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And that's something to be very proud of.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Let's go home, Yor.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Er, yes... Thank you for the lovely party, everyone.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I-I'm so sorry I said I was your husband.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, it's all right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm not sure what to tell your brother if he hears of this.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, Loid... I have a suggestion.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Remnants of the smuggling ring?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hang on, Yor!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How did they know where I was?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Did they... leave a tracking device in the art pieces?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You've definitely let your guard down, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Who are those people?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Um, uh...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I-It appears some of my patients still haven't recovered

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: from their psychotic episodes.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Being a doctor must be very taxing.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She actually believed it!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: In the meantime...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're making a break for it.

dialogue.name: Remnant A
dialogue.speech: They've abandoned the van.

dialogue.name: Remnant B
dialogue.speech: They're probably hiding nearby. Split up and find them.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor, this way. Hurry!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um... Are you sure it's all right for you to hit your patients like that?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Um, well...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The concussive recovery method is the latest in modern medical practices.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I see.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I can't tell if she's actually bright or dumb.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Look out, Yor!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Another one! I can't dodge it!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, no!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm so sorry an amateur like me helped with the recovery!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I happen to be an expert in self-defense.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: My brother was kind enough to teach me...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you, Yor.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That was quite impressive. Did you see how far he went?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry. I guess I did send him flying.

dialogue.name: Remnant G
dialogue.speech: There he is!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This way!

dialogue.name: Remnant G
dialogue.speech: Do whatever you need to do! Make sure they're dead!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, Loid... This may not be the best moment to ask,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: but why don't we get married?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry?!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Er, well, it would extend our agreement...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I mean... Apparently, I'm considered suspicious just for being single,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: so it'd be nice camouflage...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: For me to continue my job as an assassin, too.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um, basically,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: if it's all right with you, maybe we could just stay together,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: and not just for the interview...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: For both our sakes.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: He's probably the only person who could accept me for who I am right now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Then let's stop by city hall on our way back to fill out the paperwork.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? Right now?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They do say no time like the present.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, that's right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Where did I drop it?

dialogue.name: Remnant B
dialogue.speech: You b*stard!

dialogue.name: Remnant B
dialogue.speech: We have 'em cornered!

dialogue.name: Remnant A
dialogue.speech: Fill 'em full of lead!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Even in sickness,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: or in sadness...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No matter what hardships await us,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: let us be there for one another.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: All right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Until my mission...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Until my k*lling...

dialogue.name: Loid and Yor
dialogue.speech: ...do us part.
